abilities.name: Celebrity
abilities.text: After this model resolves the Interact action, it may choose an enemy model within 6" to gain an Entranced token.

abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Luck Thief
abilities.text: When performing opposed duels against this model, enemy models treat all (+) as if they were (-).

triggers.name: Red and Black
triggers.text: Once per activation. Non-master enemy only. Choose two suits. The target must discard a card of either chosen suit or declare an action controlled and chosen by this model.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Dirigible Ride
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 4" of its current location.

triggers.name: Ride Along
triggers.text: Target must be within 2" of this model. Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Won Over
triggers.text: Enemy only. Target gains a Shame token.

triggers.name: Glory of Ridley
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 1-3 from your discard pile.

actions.name: Fortune's Favor
actions.effects: Look at the top three cards of your fate deck and discard any number of them. Place the remaining cards on top of your fate deck in any order. This model may move up to 2" for each card discarded this way.

triggers.name: Disperse the Crowd
triggers.text: An ally within 2" moves up to 4" and gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.
